sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = 1; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 1; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT * FROM test_table; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(); ROLLBACK;
